ticket.subject: Mend Footwear has a question about PH MultiCarrier Shipping Label
ticket.raw_subject: Mend Footwear has a question about PH MultiCarrier Shipping Label
ticket.description:
*****************************************************************
Mend Footwear (mend-footwear.myshopify.com) sent you a message
about PH MultiCarrier Shipping Label
*****************************************************************

Mend Footwear <gunjan.narayanan@gmail.com>
------------------------------------------------

HEllo

I had emailed earlier about some COD orders turnign manual. when
we try to edit the payment type, we get a blank page.

I am confused firstly as to why the payment is showing manual on
these cod orders and how do i solve this problem.

An order i need urgent help with - 18212

© Shopify | 151 O’Connor Street, Ottawa ON, K2P
2L8

comments.body:
Hello Gunjan,

Good Day!

We would like to check this case further from our end.

For this we would require Collaborator Access for your store. We have raised the request from our end on email id gunjan.narayanan@gmail.com

Please accept and let us know by replying to this email.

Awaiting your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello ,



Somehow the issue has been resolved for now.



Will reach out when the issue arises again. Can. You share why COD payments are being marked as manual . Attaching screenshots for the same for your reference.



These updates are also very time wasting . Why is the payment mode Manual in these. We have to check physically the payment mode and then make bookings.



Kindly help.



Thanks



 ![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/dzx1Lp361OiBNArXHKsXkwqYw/?name=IMG_0994.jpeg)
comments.html_body:
Hello ,

Somehow the issue has been resolved for now. 

Will reach out when the issue arises again. Can. You share why COD payments are being marked as manual . Attaching screenshots for the same for your reference. 

These updates are also very time wasting . Why is the payment mode Manual in these. We have to check physically the payment mode and then make bookings.

Kindly help.

Thanks

comments.body:
Hello Gunjan,

Thank you for your patience.

Upon reviewing the COD orders, we noticed that the payment type for these orders is initially being updated to **"Manual"** by your **Magic Checkout** solution, and then later changed to **"Cash on Delivery"**. This sequence is causing the orders to appear as “Manual” in the system.

I have informed my team to explore how we can assist you in addressing this case. In the meantime, I’d appreciate the opportunity to discuss this with you over a quick call to align on the next steps.

Please let me know if you’d be available for a call tomorrow.

Best regards,
Keerthi
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Gunjan,
 
Thank you for your patience.
 
Upon reviewing the COD orders, we noticed that the payment type for these orders is initially being updated to "Manual" by your Magic Checkout solution, and then later changed to "Cash on Delivery". This sequence is causing the orders to appear as “Manual” in the system.
 
I have informed my team to explore how we can assist you in addressing this case. In the meantime, I’d appreciate the opportunity to discuss this with you over a quick call to align on the next steps.
 
Please let me know if you’d be available for a call tomorrow.
 
Best regards,
Keerthi
PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Gunjan,

Good day!

We’d be happy to assist you with any changes you need. When you mention an upgrade, are you referring to upgrading your subscription plan for the app?

If so, this can typically be done from the app by navigating to **Settings > Manage Subscriptions**.

I believe you're already familiar with this process, but could you please clarify what you mean by being unable to proceed? Are you encountering any specific error messages?

If possible, please share a screenshot or screen recording of the issue so we can take a closer look and provide accurate assistance.

We’d also be happy to connect over a call if that’s more convenient for you.

Best regards,
Keerthi
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Gunjan,
 
Good day!
 
We’d be happy to assist you with any changes you need. When you mention an upgrade, are you referring to upgrading your subscription plan for the app?
 
If so, this can typically be done from the app by navigating to Settings > Manage Subscriptions. 
 
I believe you're already familiar with this process, but could you please clarify what you mean by being unable to proceed? Are you encountering any specific error messages?
 
If possible, please share a screenshot or screen recording of the issue so we can take a closer look and provide accurate assistance.
 
We’d also be happy to connect over a call if that’s more convenient for you.
 
Best regards,
Keerthi
PluginHive
